Appearances:
Plaintiff Fillmore Street Apartments is present via its representative, Patrick Wong.

Defendants Jerry Ostrin and Kathia Zolfaghari are present.
Attorney Tom Elke of Elke & Merchant (415-294-4111) is present for the defendants in full scope.

Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Room 501A, re settlement discussions. The CASE IS not SETTLED. The TRIAL DATE OF JUL-14-2014 REMAINS ON CALENDAR.
